insights.title: Highest deaths
insights.text: Andhra Pradesh leads by deaths with 2,435.

insights.title: Highest people affected
insights.text: Tamil Nadu leads by people affected with 24,790,000.

insights.text: South India contributes 280 of 453 total events in the summary.
